name: @tootallnate/hca
description: Pure-JS decoder for CRI Middleware's HCA audio codec — parses the HCA container, decodes the MDCT-based bitstream to interleaved Float32 PCM, supports type-0/1/56 cipher decryption, and ships a tiny WAV (RIFF/PCM or float) encoder.
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
